original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Riley, Ava, Olivia, and Penelope. "Olivia is a knight if and only if Penelope is a knave" - Riley. Ava expressed that Riley is a knight if and only if Penelope is a knave. According to Olivia, "Penelope is a knight". Penelope told you that Riley is a knave or Ava is a knave. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
